meta.siteTitle: Shiori — A living archive of your days
meta.siteDescription: Turn journals, completed tasks, learning notes, and development logs into a growing, searchable bookshelf.

common.noContents: This record has no section headings.

hero.subline: EVERY ENTRY BECOMES A STRATUM OF THE LIFE YOU ARE BUILDING.
hero.leftBody: Journals, finished work, lessons, and ordinary days accumulate into a private geology of the life you have lived.
hero.rightBody: Move the cursor to uncover a second landscape beneath the surface. Open a volume and return to that moment.
hero.rightBodyTouch: Explore the layers, open a volume, and return to the moment it preserves.

home.introTitle: A line written today becomes tomorrow’s stratum.
home.introBody1: Shiori keeps your writing as portable Markdown in your own GitHub repository.
home.introBody2: Browse by date, content language, record type, tag, or project. The archive remains useful with a handful of records or hundreds.
home.shelvesDescription: Browse the spines or search the words inside them.
home.selectedDescription: Pages kept close, like core samples from the life underneath.
home.agentTitle: Speak. Save. Let the archive grow.
home.agentBody: An AI agent can read AGENTS.md, choose the date and metadata, and add the record in the correct place.
home.agentExample: I finished the search screen today. Add what I learned and the completed tasks to the development log.
home.sampleNoticeBody: These sample records show how Shiori works. After adding your own writing, remove files marked sample: true.
home.firstTitle: Place the first volume on the shelf
home.firstBody: Add a Markdown file to content/records and the archive will begin to grow.

archive.title: Every record
archive.description: Search by words, date, content language, type, tag, or project.
archive.searchPlaceholder: Search title, summary, tags, or project
archive.emptyBody: Try a shorter search or remove one filter.

browse.title: Explore the archive
browse.description: Enter through time, subject, project, format, or language.

about.title: A personal archive that stays yours.
about.lead: Shiori turns plain Markdown into a searchable, growing bookshelf—without a database, CMS, API key, or environment variables.
about.ownershipBody: Every record is a normal Markdown file in your GitHub repository. You can read, edit, move, or export it without Shiori.
about.languageBody: The interface uses locale packs, while each record declares its own language and text direction. Mixed-language archives work by design.
about.agentTitle: Designed for people and AI agents
about.agentBody: AGENTS.md defines where records belong, which metadata to use, what must stay private, and what to verify before pushing.
about.deployBody: Connect the repository to Cloudflare Pages, build with npm run build, and publish dist. Future pushes deploy automatically.
about.addBody: Copy content/_templates/record.md into content/records/YYYY/MM and rename it to YYYY-MM-DD-short-slug.md.
about.customizeBody: Edit config/site.json for brand settings and add or modify JSON locale packs in config/i18n. Ordinary changes need no template editing.

record.translationOf: This record is also available in:

search.title: Search the archive
search.placeholder: Type a title, date, tag, or phrase
search.hint: Searches every published record, in any language.
search.loadingError: The search index could not be loaded. Reload the page and try again.
search.empty: Start typing to search the whole archive.
search.noResultsHint: Try a shorter phrase or a tag name.
search.keyboardHint: Use ↑ and ↓ to move, Enter to open, Esc to close.

notFound.title: This page is not on the shelf.
notFound.body: The address may have changed, or the record may have been removed.
